title: setValue()
text: setValue() Sets the text of the specified field label. LabelObject .setValue( Value ) Arguments Value New value for the field. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Example: Setting the Text of a Label A Label object can be obtained from an occurrence or from a field, so the following statements are equivalent. Explain this code vText = this.getEntity("ENT1").getOccurrence(0).getField("NAME").getLabel().setValue("Family Name"); vText = this.getEntity("ENT1").getOccurrence(0).getLabel("NAME").setValue("Family Name"); Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid.
